brand.name: Ordia
brand.logo_description: Bold single-stroke open 'O' cycle-loop mark (navy tile, white mark). Wordmark 'ORDIA' uppercase.

headings.usage: Use for all H1, H2, H3, H4 and wordmark

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and standard text

mono.usage: Use for SKUs, Order IDs, Code, and tabular data where alignment matters

layout.spacing: Lots of whitespace. Use p-8 or p-12 for page wrappers. Maintain airy, premium feel.
layout.sidebar: Minimal icon sidebar with badges. Fixed left. Global Cmd+K always available.
layout.order_review: Two columns (50/50 or 40/60): Left = original document PDF/email/image (sticky), Right = editable AI-extracted table with suggestions/warnings.
layout.home: 'AI Command Center' layout: Hero natural-language summary first, then orders-to-review, latest activity, AI notifications, recent customers.

components.buttons: Midnight-blue primary buttons (#0B1E3B). Modern, slightly rounded (rounded-md), smooth hover states.
components.cards: Subtle 1px border (border-border/40), very light shadow-sm. No heavy gradients or dark shadows. Keep it clean.
components.inputs: Shadcn default with customized subtle borders. Focus state should use a subtle ring of the primary color.
components.badges: Rounded-full, soft backgrounds (e.g., bg-gray-100 text-gray-800) or brand-tinted.
components.tables: High data density for order rows. Clean borders. Must support inline editing, row duplication, drag-and-drop.
components.ai_elements: Subtle visual treatment for AI. Use sparkles icon or a subtle indigo tint for AI confidence scores, suggestions, and auto-mapped fields.

animations.general: Micro-animations on hover/loading/success/error/skeleton. Smooth but never slow.
animations.loading: Skeletons with subtle pulse. No harsh flashing.
animations.transitions: Use Framer Motion for elegant page transitions (opacity 0 to 1, y 5 to 0).
animations.ai_import: Elegant progression steps: Upload -> AI analysis -> customer recognition -> catalog matching -> confidence -> order ready.

products.description: Brown cardboard box on white table

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: ALL text in the UI MUST be in Italian. E.g., 'Cerca', 'Nuovo Ordine', 'Ordini', 'Clienti', 'Impostazioni'.
CRITICAL: Use ONLY the brand colors. Primary is Midnight Blue (#0B1E3B). Do not change the name 'Ordia', logo mark, or colors.
Use Lucide icons for the minimal sidebar and across all components.
Build the Home page as an 'AI Command Center' with an intelligent natural-language summary hero section (e.g., 'Oggi 18 ordini, 16 automatici, 2 da revisionare').
Do NOT use heavy shadows, gradients, or fake KPIs/useless charts. The UI should be highly functional and minimalistic (like Stripe/Linear).
The 'New Order' screen must be spectacular: big modern channel buttons and a drag-and-drop zone.
The 'Order Review' screen must feature a two-column layout: left for original document, right for the editable AI-extracted table.
Implement inline order building: add/duplicate/drag rows, product search directly within the table.
Provide a Shopify-grade catalog experience with instant search and filters.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are added to all interactive and key informational elements.
Mobile must be designed per-screen specifically, not just squeezed down.
